title: L-man's Better Eggs
description: Eggs have a lot of missing potential. this mod fixes that issue.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e29aded5018bfed2be8e75d05d2489fa27a2a320.png)

This Mod aims to fufill the missing potintal of minecraft eggs

with furnaces, crafting, and even cocobeans, you can now craft 8 new uses/ways to use and eat eggs, making them much more usful.

**New Eggs**
- Hard Boiled
- Develed
- Scrambled
- Sunny Side
- Fried
- Egg Whites
- Quiche
- Chocolate

all survival friendly and all Crafting recipes listed in images tab!
